'''Orame''' was a civilian worker at the [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] during the events of the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. She often worked as a flight controller supervisor at the hangar.

When [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Zekk]] and [[Jagged Fel]] came to Ossus searching for [[Alema Rar]], Orame warned them that something was amiss in the Praxeum by telling them to watch out for [[gokob]]s after the Praxeum was taken under the control of [[Salle Serpa|Serpa]] and his [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] battalion. After Jaina made mention of [[Roqoo Depot]], she searched a starmap and discovered that [[Roqoo]] was exactly in between [[Kavan]] and Ossus.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''
